"'''Mission to Myrkr'''" is a web enhancement published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] for ''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]''. It was written by [[J.D. Wiker]] and published on [[February 7]], [[2002]].

==Publisher's summary==
This short adventure for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] is set in The [[New Jedi Order]] era, during the events of the novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'', and it's designed for four to six [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] heroes of 6th to 8th level (though other heroes are welcome, too). ''Mission to Myrkr'' is a free web enhancement for The New Jedi Order Sourcebook in which your heroes will get to spy on the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] for none other than Master [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] himself! Check out this bonus material, exclusive to our website!
